- content: 'Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024

    Attendee: Emma Johnson, David Lee, Linda Green, Mark Roberts


    Meeting Overview:

    - Discussed the progress of the new project.

    - Reviewed the marketing strategies and upcoming campaigns.

    - Discussed the sales projections and customer feedback.


    Action Items:

    - David: coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase. Deadline:
    2024-05-20.

    - Linda: email the ''meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx'' file to ''john.mitchell@gmail.com''
    at for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

    - Mark: review the sales projections and provide feedback. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

    '

- content: "Meeting Agenda - May 15, 2024
1. Welcome and Introductions
2. Review\

args.subject: Action required: Start initial development phase (due 2024-05-20)
args.body:
Hi David,

From the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): please coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the new project.

What to do:
- Confirm which developers will work on the initial phase.
- Create a brief kickoff plan with tasks and owners for the first sprint.
- Share the plan with me and the development team by the deadline.

Deadline: 2024-05-20.

If you need help or there are blockers, let me know as soon as possible.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Send meeting agenda to John Mitchell (due 2024-05-21)
args.body:
Hi Linda,

From the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): please email the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review.

What to do:
- Attach the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to an email to john.mitchell@gmail.com.
- In the email, ask John to review and provide any comments or requested changes.
- Copy me on the message and confirm when it’s sent.

Deadline: 2024-05-21.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Review sales projections and provide feedback (due 2024-05-19)
args.body:
Hi Mark,

From the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): please review the sales projections and provide your feedback.

What to do:
- Review the latest sales projections document and note any concerns, questions, or suggested adjustments.
- Provide specific feedback (numbers, assumptions, or narrative) in an email reply or a short document.
- Send your feedback to me and the team.

Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
